config.arch_notes: Baseline: 4-block 3D CNN, GlobalAvgPool, Linear(256→5). No augmentation. No LR schedule.
Baseline + CosineAnnealingLR(T_max=300). No augmentation.
Baseline + heavy regularization: DROPOUT=0.5, WEIGHT_DECAY=1e-3. No augmentation. No LR schedule.
Baseline + augmentation (H/V/D flips p=0.5, intensity jitter, gaussian noise). LR=1e-4, DROPOUT=0.5, WD=1e-3. Label smoothing=0.1.
Augmentation + CosineAnnealingLR(T_max=300, eta_min=1e-6). LR=1e-4, DROPOUT=0.5, WD=1e-3. Label smoothing=0.1.
Small model (1→16→32→64→128), per-sample augmentation. LR=1e-4, DROPOUT=0.5, WD=1e-3. Label smoothing=0.1. No scheduler.
Small model (1→16→32→64→128), per-sample augmentation. LR=1e-4, DROPOUT=0.5, WD=1e-3. Label smoothing=0.1. No scheduler.
Baseline model (1→32→64→128→256), per-sample augmentation. LR=1e-4, DROPOUT=0.5, WD=1e-3. Label smoothing=0.1. No scheduler.
ResNet-style small model (1→16→32→64→128) with residual connections. Per-sample augmentation. LR=3e-4, DROPOUT=0.4, WD=1e-3. Label smoothing=0.1.
ResNet-style small model (1→16→32→64→128) with residual connections. Per-sample augmentation. LR=1e-4, DROPOUT=0.5, WD=1e-3. Label smoothing=0.1.
ResNet small (1→16→32→64→128) + augmentation (flips+jitter+noise+random_crop). LR=3e-4, DROPOUT=0.5, WD=1e-3. Label smoothing=0.1.
ResNet small (1→16→32→64→128) + SE blocks + augmentation (flips+jitter+noise). LR=3e-4, DROPOUT=0.4, WD=1e-3. Label smoothing=0.1.
ResNet+SE + Mixup(alpha=0.4) + augmentation (flips+jitter+noise). LR=3e-4, DROPOUT=0.4, WD=1e-3. Label smoothing=0.1.
ResNet+SE wider (1→32→64→128→256) + augmentation (flips+jitter+noise). LR=3e-4, DROPOUT=0.4, WD=1e-3. Label smoothing=0.1.
3-block ResNet+SE (1→32→64→128) + 2-layer head (128→64→5). Per-sample augmentation. LR=3e-4, DROPOUT=0.4, WD=1e-3. Label smoothing=0.1.
4-block ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128) + OneCycleLR(max_lr=1e-3, steps=20000). Per-sample augmentation. LR=3e-4, DROPOUT=0.4, WD=1e-3. Label smoothing=0.1.
4-block ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128) + stochastic depth (p=0.2). Per-sample augmentation. LR=3e-4, DROPOUT=0.4, WD=1e-3. Label smoothing=0.1.
4-block ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128), BS=4 (more steps). Per-sample augmentation. LR=3e-4, DROPOUT=0.4, WD=1e-3. Label smoothing=0.1.
4-block ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128) + grad_clip=1.0 + WD=5e-3. Per-sample augmentation. LR=3e-4, DROPOUT=0.4. Label smoothing=0.1.
4-block ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128) + CosineAnnealingWarmRestarts(T0=50). Per-sample augmentation. LR=3e-4, DROPOUT=0.4, WD=1e-3. Label smoothing=0.1.
4-block ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128) + TTA (8 augmented passes at eval). Per-sample augmentation. LR=3e-4, DROPOUT=0.4, WD=1e-3. Label smoothing=0.1.
4-block ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128), two-phase: LR=3e-4 for 50s then LR=1e-5 for 10s. Per-sample augmentation. DROPOUT=0.4, WD=1e-3. Label smoothing=0.1.
4-block ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128), two-phase: LR=3e-4 for 50s then LR=1e-5 for 10s. Per-sample augmentation. DROPOUT=0.4, WD=1e-3. Label smoothing=0.1.
4-block ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128), two-phase: LR=3e-4 for 35s then LR=1e-5 for 25s. Per-sample augmentation. DROPOUT=0.4, WD=1e-3. Label smoothing=0.1.
4-block ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128), 3-phase LR: 3e-4 (0-45s) → 3e-5 (45-52s) → 1e-5 (52-60s). Per-sample augmentation. DROPOUT=0.4, WD=1e-3. Label smoothing=0.1.
4-block ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128), two-phase: LR=3e-4 for 50s then LR=1e-5 for 10s. Per-sample augmentation. DROPOUT=0.4, WD=1e-3. Label smoothing=0.2.
4-block ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128), two-phase: LR=3e-4 for 50s then LR=1e-5 for 10s. Per-sample augmentation + random 90-deg axial rotation. DROPOUT=0.4, WD=1e-3. Label smoothing=0.1.
4-block ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128), two-phase: LR=3e-4 for 50s then LR=1e-5 for 10s. Per-sample augmentation. DROPOUT=0.4, WD=1e-3. Label smoothing=0.1. Best-checkpoint restore.
4-block ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128), two-phase: LR=3e-4 for 50s then LR=1e-5 for 10s. Per-sample augmentation. DROPOUT=0.4, WD=1e-3. Label smoothing=0.1. Best-checkpoint restore.
4-block ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128), two-phase: LR=3e-4 for 50s then LR=1e-5 for 10s. SGD+Nesterov(momentum=0.9) instead of AdamW. Per-sample augmentation. DROPOUT=0.4, WD=1e-3. Label smoothing=0.1.
4-block ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128), two-phase: LR=3e-4 for 50s then LR=1e-5 for 10s. Focal loss (gamma=2) instead of CE. Per-sample augmentation. DROPOUT=0.4, WD=1e-3.
Ensemble of 3 × 4-block ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128), each trained 18s then fine-tuned 2s (LR=1e-5). Majority-vote at inference. Per-sample augmentation. DROPOUT=0.4, WD=1e-3. Label smoothing=0.1.
4-block ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128), two-phase: LR=3e-4 for 50s then LR=1e-5 for 10s. Fixed seed=42. Per-sample augmentation. DROPOUT=0.4, WD=1e-3. Label smoothing=0.1.

4-block ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128), two-phase: LR=3e-4 for 50s then LR=1e-5 for 10s. Depth attention pooling (learned slice weights). Per-sample augmentation. DROPOUT=0.4, WD=1e-3. Label smoothing=0.1.
4-block ResNet+SE (1→16→32→64→128), two-phase: LR=3e-4 for 50s then LR=1e-5 for 10s. Vectorized batch augmentation (faster, more epochs). GAP restored. DROPOUT=0.4, WD=1e-3. Label smoothing=0.1.
